channel.title: Doq on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Doq on Pi Stack

item.title: Knot Resolver vs Blocky vs DNSCrypt-Proxy: Self-Hosted DNS-over-QUIC Guide 2026
item.description: DNS-over-QUIC (DoQ) is the newest encrypted DNS protocol, standardized in RFC 9250 in 2022. It combines the privacy benefits of DNS encryption with the performance advantages of the QUIC transport protocol — delivering faster, more reliable DNS resolution than traditional DNS-over-TLS (DoT) or DNS-over-HTTPS (DoH).
